---
title: "Project"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(GGally)
library(tidyverse)

library(ggplot2)
library(maps)
library(usmap)

read
arch_records <- data(vmnh_archaeology_catalog_records)

head(arch_records)
names(arch_records)
colnames(arch_records)
```

```{r}
ggplot(arch_records, aes(x = `Class 2`, y = Quantity)) +
geom_point(aes(color = `Class 4`))
```

```{r}
#Just messing around with map data, please ignore
plot_usmap(fill = "grey30", color = "white")
plot_usmap(color = "white", data = arch_records, values = "state")
plot_usmap(color = "white", data = arch_records, values = "state")+
scale_fill_gradient(high = "blue", low = "white")
```
